Off Calendar Mar-02-2017 Off Calendar

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-16-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:13 a.m.: The Court takes the bench for the Small Claim Appeals Calendar and calls Case
Number CSM-16-851485 in the matter of Mr. Ching Lung Lai, Appellant vs. Dylan T. Hackett;
both parties present. Attorney Andrew H. Dai, Esq. of the Law Offices of Darius T. Chan, appears for Appellant Ching Lung Lai. The Clerk administers the oath to both sides; the Court then hears statements by Appellant Ching Lung Lai, followed by statements presented by Respondent Dylan T. Hackett, all proceedings are not placed on the record. The Court receives documentary evidence presentedby both sides for the Court's reading and review.

Having heard all statements made by both parties and by counsel for Appellant named above,
the Court thereupon takes the matter under submission, informing both sides they will be notified of the Court's decision by mail.

PRO TEM JUDGE DIANA B. KRUZE; CLERK: MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 525).

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
